calendar.matters:
Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Apr-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch (Trustee).

The Court raised the issue of whether the 10-day notice requirement was satisfied with respect to the published notice of sale. Ms. Rasch stated that they did not accept offers until more than a month later and that there is no prejudice. The Court proceeded with the sale. The sale was confirmed at $1,604,900.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed March 23, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

payments.description: PETN AND OPP RE INTERNAL AFFAIRS OF 17200 TRUST
